name: Rent's Due: The Game
short_description: Rent's Due: The Game is a third-person platformer game where you take control of protagonist Tesha Robinson. Tesha is in need of some money and in order to get it, she must complete different levels with various obstacles that provide a huge challenge.
detailed_description:
Rent's Due: The Game is a third-person platformer game where you take control of protagonist Tesha Robinson. Tesha needs some money, and to get enough, she has to complete different levels and overcome different obstacles that present a huge challenge. The Game will feature 30 levels with varying environments and weather.

Test your skill with a momentum-based platformer that will test your timing and reactions. Enjoy 30 levels that take place in various locations. Beat all 30 levels if you can; the levels get larger the further into the game you get. Most importantly, Enjoy The Game!
